specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Precision Marine Care on the Chesapeake
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a trusted marine service provider based in Annapolis, Maryland, proudly serving boat owners throughout the Chesapeake Bay region and beyond. We've built our reputation on honest work, careful attention to detail, and the kind of comprehensive vessel care that keeps boats running the way they should — season after season.

Our team handles a wide range of marine services, including professional boat surveying and inspection for pre-purchase evaluations and insurance requirements, diving and underwater services for hull inspections, zinc replacement, and prop work without ever hauling out, marine AC and climate control system installation and repair to keep your cabin comfortable year-round, and marine plumbing and sanitation work covering everything from through-hull fittings to holding tank systems. Whatever your vessel needs, we bring the same level of precision and reliability to every job.

We serve boat owners across the Annapolis waterfront, the broader Anne Arundel County area, and throughout the Chesapeake Bay — from the upper Bay down through the tributaries and beyond. Whether you're prepping for a new season, dealing with an unexpected repair, or buying a boat and need a thorough inspection before you sign anything, Ben's Boatworks is the crew you can count on. We take your investment seriously, and we treat every vessel like it matters — because to you, it does.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing. Serving the Chesapeake Bay region. Call today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks conducts thorough vessel surveys and inspections covering structural integrity, mechanical systems, safety equipment, and overall condition — whether you need a pre-purchase survey, an insurance survey, or a condition-and-value report. Our detailed written reports give boat buyers and owners a clear, honest picture of exactly what they're working with before making any decisions.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our dive team handles below-the-waterline work without the time and cost of a haul-out, including hull inspections, zinc anode replacement, propeller removal and installation, line and debris clearing, and underwater video documentation. Keeping up with underwater maintenance protects your hull coating, running gear, and through-hull fittings from the kind of damage that gets expensive fast.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems, including raw-water cooled units, reverse-cycle systems, and multi-zone setups for larger vessels. Proper installation and regular maintenance keep your system running efficiently and extend the life of the equipment through the demands of a saltwater environment.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We handle full marine plumbing and sanitation work, including through-hull fitting installation and inspection, seacock service, freshwater system repairs, and holding tank system installation and compliance work. A properly maintained sanitation system isn't just about comfort — it's about keeping your vessel compliant with marine regulations and protecting the water you sail on.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 500-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full written inspection report
Hull and running gear inspection via underwater dive service
Zinc anode replacement without hauling out of the water
Marine air conditioning system installation on cruising vessel
Reverse-cycle climate control repair and refrigerant service
Holding tank and sanitation system installation for compliance
Through-hull fitting and seacock inspection or replacement

reviewSynopsis.summary: Our clients trust us to solve the tough problems that other shops can't, like complex fuel injection issues on large vessels that have stumped other mechanics. We take pride in showing up when we say we will, offering fair pricing, and delivering results that leave boats running better than ever. The satisfaction our customers feel is clear in the word-of-mouth referrals we receive from marina communities.
